title: Pack of 4 Whoopee Cushions with Straw | Fun Prank Toy for Kids & Adults | Assorted Colours | Party Bag Fillers, Stocking Fillers, Lucky Dip Prizes, and Novelty Gifts
features: 🎉 Ultimate Prank Fun: Enjoy endless pranks with this set of 4 whoopee cushions, each in assorted vibrant colours, perfect for parties, gifts, and family fun!
🛠️ Easy Inflation with Straw: Each cushion comes with a handy straw for effortless inflation – simply blow it up, set it down, and get ready for giggles galore!
🤣 Durable and Reusable: Made from sturdy materials for long-lasting use – inflate, prank, and repeat the fun as many times as you like.
🏅 Perfect Party Bag Fillers: Ideal for birthday parties, lucky dips, and stocking stuffers, these novelty toys are a hit with kids and adults alike.
🎁 Great Gift for All Ages: Whether for kids or the young at heart, these whoopee cushions make perfect gag gifts and a must-have for any prank-loving family.
